home.heroDescription: Connecting businesses with professional drivers for seamless, trackable deliveries across Egypt.

why.title: WHY we do what we do
why.description: In today's fast-paced business world, reliable delivery services are the backbone of successful e-commerce. We believe that every package represents a promise to customers, and every delivery builds trust between businesses and their clients. Our mission is to eliminate delivery uncertainties and create seamless logistics experiences that empower businesses to focus on what they do best.

how.title: HOW we do it
how.description: Through cutting-edge technology and a network of professional drivers, we provide real-time tracking, automated routing optimization, and seamless communication between all stakeholders. Our platform integrates with popular e-commerce systems, ensuring smooth data flow and minimal manual intervention. We prioritize efficiency, transparency, and reliability in every step of the delivery process.

cards.title: Same-Day Delivery
cards.description: Express delivery within city limits for urgent orders, with a maximum 2-day policy

cards.title: Real-Time Tracking
cards.description: Live updates and GPS tracking for all packages. [Soon]

cards.title: API Integration
cards.description: Seamless integration with your existing systems

who.title: WHO we are
who.description: Founded in 2025, Droppin has rapidly become Egypt's leading last-mile delivery platform. Our team consists of logistics experts, technology innovators, and customer service professionals dedicated to revolutionizing the delivery industry. We partner with businesses of all sizes, from local boutiques to major e-commerce platforms, ensuring their success through reliable logistics.

cards.title: For Shops
cards.description: Manage your deliveries, track packages, and ensure customer satisfaction.

cards.title: For Drivers
cards.description: Pick up and deliver packages efficiently with our easy-to-use platform.

cards.title: For Customers
cards.description: Track your packages in real-time and receive timely updates.

hero.title: About Droppin Delivery
hero.subtitle: Revolutionizing Last-mile delivery in Egypt with technology-driven solutions

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Founded in 2025, Droppin Delivery was built to solve a clear market need: dependable, transparent, and modern last-mile logistics for Egypt.
story.paragraph2: What started as a focused team has grown into a trusted delivery platform connecting shops with professional drivers for smooth nationwide fulfillment.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To modernize last-mile delivery in Egypt through reliable operations, transparent tracking, and practical logistics technology that supports business growth.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the most trusted delivery platform in Egypt by setting high standards in reliability, service quality, and operational excellence.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We use modern technology to improve delivery quality and control.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We grow with our shops, drivers, and customers through long-term trust.

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: Fast execution and dependable timing are central to our model.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We maintain high standards in customer experience and service delivery.

faqs.question: How do I sign up as a shop?
faqs.answer: Go to registration and choose shop account, then complete your business details for review.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: Our primary operational coverage is Cairo and Giza with ongoing expansion support.

faqs.question: How much does delivery cost?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on shipment type, destination, and service level. Contact sales for a tailored quote.

faqs.question: How can I track my packages?
faqs.answer: Use the tracking number on the tracking page to follow shipment status in real time.

faqs.question: What if my package is damaged?
faqs.answer: Contact support immediately with package details and evidence to start review and claim handling.
